system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Medium Melee or Heavy Melee against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You stab your spear fiercely, striking deep into your foes. This Technique requires a great deal of force. You take a -1d10 penalty to make your Attack, but add 2d10 to your Damage roll. Cathartic: You can use to strike and impale multiple targets in a straight line, up to one target per level of Qi (make a single Attack roll). Anyone hit in such a manner takes one Extra Wound. The penalty still applies.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.activationSkill: Medium Melee or Heavy Melee against Parry
system.requirementNotes: This Technique requires a great deal of force.
system.catharticEffect: You can use to strike and impale multiple targets in a straight line, up to one target per level of Qi (make a single Attack roll). Anyone hit in such a manner takes one Extra Wound. The penalty still applies.
